name: RPlog_HIMS_Predator_Day_2
title: Aboard the Predator, Day Two
summary: On the bridge of the Sith Star Destroyer Predator, sheltered in the asteroid belt near Cochran, Dr. Lynae Cassius joins Captain Antoine Dareus as he directs fighter patrols and turbolaser fire against intruding smugglers. The two discuss Lynae's pending decision to join the order and her late-night conversation with Axel, who had floated the idea of a biological weapon to wipe out a planet's food supply without killing its people, a project Lynae judges feasible given a proper lab. Dareus offers to arrange such a lab pending Malign's approval and hints at a secret 'master creation' still too hazardous for human life. When Lynae presses about what Malign is truly building, Dareus deflects, calling it 'a future' she may learn of only if she joins. They also touch on Dareus's children, his terminal condition, and his refusal of marriage, with Lynae stubbornly insisting she will not simply watch him die. The conversation ends amiably as Dareus heads to rest and Lynae returns to her quarters to keep contemplating.
